hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】高盛申请比特币收入 ETF 推动加密货币发展；【CRYPTO】下一任美联储主席的投资组合中有加密货币敞口。这是详细信息；【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：美国称以色列和黎巴嫩同意进行更多和平谈判。

items.title: Goldman Sachs files for bitcoin income ETF in crypto push
items.summary: The bank is moving deeper into crypto with a bitcoin ETF that generates income by selling options on bitcoin-linked funds, following BlackRock’s push into similar yield-focused products.
items.title_zh: 高盛申请比特币收入 ETF 推动加密货币发展
items.summary_zh: 继贝莱德推出类似的以收益为中心的产品之后，该银行正在通过比特币 ETF 进一步进军加密领域，该 ETF 通过出售比特币相关基金的期权来产生收入。

items.title: The next Fed chair has crypto exposure in his portfolio. Here are the details
items.summary: Kevin Warsh's financial disclosure reveals stakes in DeFi protocols, Ethereum scaling networks, a Bitcoin Lightning startup, and prediction markets — all of which he's promised to sell.
items.title_zh: 下一任美联储主席的投资组合中有加密货币敞口。这是详细信息
items.summary_zh: Kevin Warsh 的财务披露披露了他在 DeFi 协议、以太坊扩展网络、比特币闪电初创公司和预测市场中的股份——他承诺出售所有这些股份。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Says Israel and Lebanon Agree to More Peace Talks
items.summary: Fighting continued in southern Lebanon between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah, even as Israeli and Lebanese diplomats met in Washington. The war in Lebanon has threatened to undermine the U.S.-Iran cease-fire.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国称以色列和黎巴嫩同意进行更多和平谈判
items.summary_zh: 尽管以色列和黎巴嫩外交官在华盛顿会面，但以色列和伊朗支持的真主党之间的黎巴嫩南部战斗仍在继续。黎巴嫩战争有可能破坏美伊停火。

items.title: Prediction markets will grow to $1 trillion by 2030, Bernstein estimates
items.summary: The investment bank said volumes will reach an estimated $240 billion in 2026 and grow at a 80% compound annual rate between 2025 and 2030.
items.title_zh: Bernstein 估计，到 2030 年，预测市场将增长至 1 万亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该投资银行表示，预计 2026 年交易量将达到 2400 亿美元，并在 2025 年至 2030 年间以 80% 的复合年增长率增长。

items.title: Treasury Secretary Bessent backs rate cuts but says he understands if the Fed wants to wait
items.summary: Bessent has previously said the Fed should hasten cutting interest rates, calling reductions "the only ingredient missing" for stronger economic growth.
items.title_zh: 财政部长贝森特支持降息，但表示他理解美联储是否愿意等待
items.summary_zh: 贝森特此前曾表示，美联储应加快降息，称降息是经济增长强劲的“唯一缺失的因素”。

items.title: China exports growth in March misses estimates, imports surge most in over four years
items.summary: China's export growth slowed in March as manufacturers grappled with surging energy costs, with the Iran war disrupting supplies, while imports jumped more than expected.
items.title_zh: 中国3月份出口增速低于预期，进口增幅为四年多来最大
items.summary_zh: 由于制造商努力应对能源成本飙升以及伊朗战争扰乱供应，中国三月份出口增长放缓，而进口增幅超出预期。

items.title: As War Chills Economy, Dubai’s Most Vulnerable Bear the Cost
items.summary: Migrant workers in the United Arab Emirates, whose hospitality industry has been hit hard by the war with Iran, are facing furloughs, pay cuts and even repatriation.
items.title_zh: 战争使经济陷入寒冬，迪拜最脆弱的群体承受了代价
items.summary_zh: 阿拉伯联合酋长国的酒店业因与伊朗的战争而受到严重打击，他们的移民工人正面临休假、减薪甚至遣返的问题。

items.title: Russian Oil Revenues Nearly Doubled in March
items.summary: The surge in revenue provided a critical lifeline for Moscow, which has struggled to fund the war in Ukraine amid record-high deficits.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯三月份石油收入几乎翻倍
items.summary_zh: 收入的激增为莫斯科提供了重要的生命线，莫斯科在创纪录的高赤字下一直难以为乌克兰战争提供资金。

items.title: Popular DeFi platform warns users to stay away from its site after security breach
items.summary: The team that helps operate the platform, CoW Swap, said that it was working to resolve the issue for the DEX aggregator.
items.title_zh: 热门 DeFi 平台在安全漏洞后警告用户远离其网站
items.summary_zh: 帮助运营该平台的团队 CoW Swap 表示，他们正在努力解决 DEX 聚合器的问题。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation launches $1 million crypto security subsidy, providing access to over 20 audit firms
items.summary: The EF tapped Areta's audit marketplace to provide access to over 20 security firms like Blocksec, Cetora, Hacken, Immunefi and Quantstamp.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会推出 100 万美元加密货币安全补贴，为 20 多家审计公司提供访问权限
items.summary_zh: EF 利用 Areta 的审计市场提供对 Blocksec、Cetora、Hacken、Immunefi 和 Quantstamp 等 20 多家安全公司的访问。

items.title: Ahead of Senate confirmation hearing, Fed pick Kevin Warsh discloses investments in a slew of crypto firms
items.summary: Federal Reserve chair nominee Kevin Warsh is set to have a confirmation hearing next week, according to multiple news reports.
items.title_zh: 在参议院确认听证会之前，美联储候选人凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 披露了对众多加密货币公司的投资
items.summary_zh: 据多份新闻报道，美联储主席提名人凯文·沃什定于下周举行确认听证会。

items.title: Bitcoin's $76,000 breakout fails but a rare signal is hinting at major market bottom
items.summary: Derivatives funding rates have now remained negative for 46 days, a streak last seen following the FTX crash which marked the bottom of 2022's crypto winter.
items.title_zh: 比特币未能突破 76,000 美元，但罕见信号暗示主要市场已触底
items.summary_zh: 衍生品融资利率现已连续 46 天保持负值，这是在 FTX 崩盘之后出现的，标志着 2022 年加密货币冬季的底部。

items.title: Goldman Sachs files for Bitcoin ETF that invests in other Bitcoin exchange-traded products
items.summary: The fund would provide exposure to ETPs that hold bitcoin, options on spot Bitcoin ETPs and options on “Bitcoin ETP Indices."
items.title_zh: 高盛申请投资其他比特币交易所交易产品的比特币 ETF
items.summary_zh: 该基金将提供持有比特币的 ETP、现货比特币 ETP 期权和“比特币 ETP 指数”期权的敞口。

items.title: Strategy’s STRC hits $1.1 billion volume as preferred stock drives Saylor’s bitcoin buying engine
items.summary: Strategy’s STRC preferred stock saw record $1.1 billion daily volume, becoming the firm's main engine for funding recent bitcoin buys.
items.title_zh: 随着优先股推动 Saylor 的比特币购买引擎，Strategy 的 STRC 交易量达到 11 亿美元
items.summary_zh: Strategy 的 STRC 优先股日交易量达到创纪录的 11 亿美元，成为该公司近期购买比特币的主要资金来源。

items.title: Omnichain token launchpad Printr rolls out V2 aiming for greater flexibility
items.summary: Printr V2 is looking to fix the “incentive misalignment" in token launches on platforms like Pump.fun, co-founder Fed said.
items.title_zh: Omnichain 代币启动板 Printr 推出 V2 旨在提高灵活性
items.summary_zh: 联合创始人 Fed 表示，Printr V2 正在寻求解决 Pump.fun 等平台上代币发行的“激励失调”问题。

items.title: Research with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to research with ChatGPT using search and deep research to find up-to-date information, analyze sources, and generate structured insights.
items.title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 进行研究
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 进行研究，使用搜索和深入研究来查找最新信息、分析来源并生成结构化见解。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: Jamie Dimon says Anthropic's Mythos reveals 'a lot more vulnerabilities' for cyberattacks
items.summary: The remarks show how a technology welcomed by corporations as a productivity boon can also pose serious threats, like uncovering new ways to hack into systems.
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 表示，Anthropic 的神话揭示了网络攻击的“更多漏洞”
items.summary_zh: 这些言论表明，一项因提高生产力而受到企业欢迎的技术也可能带来严重威胁，例如发现侵入系统的新方法。

items.title: Citigroup beats estimates, boosted by gains in fixed income
items.summary: Citigroup reported its best quarterly revenue in a decade and a 56% year-over-year jump in earnings per share.
items.title_zh: 固定收益收益推动花旗集团业绩好于预期
items.summary_zh: 花旗集团公布了十年来最好的季度营收，每股收益同比增长 56%。

items.title: How bond market's private credit crisis fears are playing out in fixed-income ETFs
items.summary: Fears of a private credit crisis arrived just as the growing and less transparent bond market was being included in more fixed-income ETFs.
items.title_zh: 债券市场对私人信贷危机的担忧如何在固定收益 ETF 中体现
items.summary_zh: 就在越来越多且透明度较低的债券市场被纳入更多固定收益 ETF 之际，对私人信贷危机的担忧也随之而来。

items.title: Hamas rejects Gaza disarmament plan, Palestinian official says
items.summary: The official tells the BBC that the armed group will not move forward with talks until Israel fully complies with its commitments.
items.title_zh: 巴勒斯坦官员称哈马斯拒绝加沙解除武装计划
items.summary_zh: 这位官员告诉英国广播公司，在以色列完全遵守其承诺之前，武装组织不会推进谈判。

items.title: US blockade of Iran ports irresponsible and dangerous, China says
items.summary: China, the biggest buyer of Iranian oil, says the US naval blockade undermines an "already fragile ceasefire".
items.title_zh: 中国称美国封锁伊朗港口不负责任且危险
items.summary_zh: 中国是伊朗石油的最大买家，表示美国的海上封锁破坏了“本已脆弱的停火”。

items.title: Hungary's next PM would pick up if Putin calls and tell him to stop Ukraine war
items.summary: Russia has offered "pragmatic" relations, but Péter Magyar says he will not call Vladimir Putin himself.
items.title_zh: 如果普京打电话告诉匈牙利下一任总理停止乌克兰战争，他将会接电话
items.summary_zh: 俄罗斯提出了“务实”的关系，但彼得·马扎尔表示，他不会亲自致电弗拉基米尔·普京。

items.title: 'They are striking everywhere' - Paramedics in Lebanon speak to BBC after Israeli strikes
items.summary: BBC Middle East correspondent Hugo Bachega joins paramedics on duty in Nabatieh - a city that was once vibrant, but is now abandoned.
items.title_zh: “他们到处发动袭击”——以色列袭击后黎巴嫩医护人员向 BBC 表示
items.summary_zh: BBC 中东记者雨果·巴切加 (Hugo Bachega) 与护理人员一起在纳巴蒂耶执勤，这座城市曾经充满活力，但现在已被遗弃。

items.title: How Peter Magyar Defeated Viktor Orban, a Former Ally, In Hungary’s Election
items.summary: For years, Peter Magyar was a loyal ally of Viktor Orban, the far-right Hungarian leader. Then he changed sides — and defeated his former boss in a landslide victory on Sunday. Does he represent real change?
items.title_zh: 彼得·马扎尔 (Peter Magyar) 如何在匈牙利选举中击败前盟友欧尔班·维克托 (Viktor Orban)
items.summary_zh: 多年来，彼得·马扎尔 (Peter Magyar) 一直是匈牙利极右翼领导人欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orban) 的忠实盟友。然后他改变了立场，并在周日以压倒性胜利击败了他的前任老板。他代表了真正的改变吗？

items.title: As Bahrain Cracked Down Amid War, a Death in Custody Sparked Outrage
items.summary: The body of a man accused of spying for Iran, Mohammed al-Mousawi, showed signs of torture, witnesses said. The U.N. has called for an investigation.
items.title_zh: 巴林在战争中镇压，拘留期间死亡引发愤怒
items.summary_zh: 目击者称，被指控为伊朗从事间谍活动的男子穆罕默德·穆萨维的尸体上有遭受酷刑的迹象。联合国已呼吁进行调查。

items.title: Benin’s Romuald Wadagni Poised to Win Presidential Election
items.summary: Romuald Wadagni received 94 percent of the vote, according to provisional results. He faces the challenge of a growing jihadist insurgency in the region.
items.title_zh: 贝宁的罗穆尔德·瓦达尼有望赢得总统选举
items.summary_zh: 根据临时结果，罗穆尔德·瓦达尼 (Romuald Wadagni) 获得了 94% 的选票。他面临着该地区日益增长的圣战叛乱的挑战。

items.title: Will Viktor Orban’s Legacy Live On in Brussels, Even Without Him?
items.summary: Viktor Orban, Hungary’s newly ousted prime minister, helped to finance a Brussels think tank that pushes his populist vision. It will outlast him, at least for a while.
items.title_zh: 即使没有欧尔班·维克托，他的遗产也会在布鲁塞尔继续存在吗？
items.summary_zh: 匈牙利新近被罢黜的总理维克托·欧尔班 (Viktor Orban) 资助了布鲁塞尔一家智库，以推动他的民粹主义愿景。它会比他更长久，至少一段时间。

items.title: Scroll moves to cut costs after top protocol migrates to Optimism
items.summary: The downsizing follows a financial hit after Scroll's top protocol migrated to Optimism, draining nearly $160 million in TVL and $13 million in annualized fees.
items.title_zh: 顶级协议迁移到 Optimism 后 Scroll 采取行动削减成本
items.summary_zh: Scroll 的顶级协议迁移到 Optimism 后，财务遭受重创，损失了近 1.6 亿美元的 TVL 和 1300 万美元的年费，此次裁员是在财务上受到打击之后发生的。

items.title: Trending Crypto: RaveDAO (RAVE)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #29.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：RaveDAO (RAVE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 29 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Aria.AI (ARIA)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #796.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Aria.AI (ARIA)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#796。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #109.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 109 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #13.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 13。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Genius (GENIUS)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #180.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：天才（GENIUS）
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 180 位。

items.title: ChatGPT for marketing teams
items.summary: Learn how marketing teams use ChatGPT to plan campaigns, generate content, analyze performance, and move from ideas to execution faster.
items.title_zh: 营销团队的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 了解营销团队如何使用 ChatGPT 来规划营销活动、生成内容、分析绩效以及更快地将想法转化为执行。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.title: Preview tool helps makers visualize 3D-printed objects
items.summary: By quickly generating aesthetically accurate previews of fabricated objects, the VisiPrint system could make prototyping faster and less wasteful.
items.title_zh: 预览工具可帮助创客可视化 3D 打印物体
items.summary_zh: 通过快速生成美观准确的预制件预览，VisiPrint 系统可以加快原型制作速度并减少浪费。

items.title: MIT researchers use AI to uncover atomic defects in materials
items.summary: A new model measures defects that can be leveraged to improve materials’ mechanical strength, heat transfer, and energy-conversion efficiency.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员利用人工智能发现材料中的原子缺陷
items.summary_zh: 一种新模型可以测量可用来提高材料机械强度、传热和能量转换效率的缺陷。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 03/31/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Tuesday, 03/31/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Selling Volatility: The Most Seductive Backtest in Finance [Quantt] Here is a strategy with a thirty-year track record. Se
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日星期二 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！卖出波动性：金融领域最诱人的回测 [Quantt] 这是一个拥有三十年记录的策略。硒

items.title: Ethereum Foundation unveils $1M audit subsidy program to boost crypto security and cut costs for builders
items.summary: The new initiative aims to address a persistent challenge in crypto development—the high cost of smart contract security audits.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会推出 100 万美元审计补贴计划，以提高加密货币安全性并降低建设者成本
items.summary_zh: 这项新举措旨在解决加密货币开发中持续存在的挑战——智能合约安全审计的高成本。

items.title: High Roller stock more than doubles on prediction markets partnership with Crypto.com
items.summary: The announcement comes as an increasing number of companies move into prediction markets, an industry that is estimated to grow to $1 trillion by 2030
items.title_zh: 由于与 Crypto.com 的预测市场合作，豪赌客股票上涨了一倍多
items.summary_zh: 这一公告发布之际，越来越多的公司进入预测市场，该行业预计到 2030 年将增长至 1 万亿美元

items.title: Bitcoin climbs to highest level since Feb. 5 crash that sent price plunging to $60,000
items.summary: Optimism over developments in the Middle East sparked a sharp decline in oil prices and rallies across risk markets.
items.title_zh: 比特币攀升至 2 月 5 日崩盘以来的最高水平，导致价格暴跌至 60,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 对中东事态发展的乐观情绪引发油价大幅下跌和风险市场反弹。

items.title: Hive, Bitfarms lead bitcoin miner-turned-AI rally with 11% gains as BTC hits two-month high
items.summary: Bitcoin climbed above $76,100 to a two-month high, while U.S. equities recovered most of their losses tied to the conflict in Iran.
items.title_zh: 随着 BTC 触及两个月高点，Hive 和 Bitfarms 涨幅达 11%，引领比特币矿机转型人工智能涨势
items.summary_zh: 比特币攀升至 76,100 美元以上，创两个月高点，而美国股市则收复了因伊朗冲突而造成的大部分损失。

items.title: CoW Swap urges users to pause amid domain hijacking
items.summary: The DEX aggregator is a particularly important component of the Ethereum ecosystem with integrations in protocols like Aave and Safe.
items.title_zh: CoW Swap 敦促用户暂停域名劫持
items.summary_zh: DEX 聚合器是以太坊生态系统中特别重要的组成部分，集成了 Aave 和 Safe 等协议。

items.title: Fake Ledger app on Apple App Store linked to $9.5M crypto theft across Bitcoin, Tron, Solana: ZachXBT
items.summary: A fake Ledger app on Apple's App Store drained $9.5M from more than 50 victims across Bitcoin, Tron and Solana, ZachXBT said.
items.title_zh: Apple App Store 上的假 Ledger 应用程序与比特币、Tron、Solana 价值 950 万美元的加密货币盗窃案有关：ZachXBT
items.summary_zh: ZachXBT 表示，苹果 App Store 上的一款假冒 Ledger 应用程序从比特币、Tron 和 Solana 的 50 多名受害者那里损失了 950 万美元。

items.title: ‘Chaos is a ladder’: Bitwise says geopolitical tension lifts bitcoin’s appeal, calls $1 million target a possible baseline price
items.summary: Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan says bitcoin has outperformed stocks and gold during the Iran conflict as geopolitical uncertainty boosts its appeal.
items.title_zh: “混乱是一个阶梯”：Bitwise 表示，地缘政治紧张局势提升了比特币的吸引力，并称 100 万美元的目标为可能的基准价格
items.summary_zh: Bitwise 首席信息官 Matt Hougan 表示，在伊朗冲突期间，由于地缘政治不确定性增强了比特币的吸引力，比特币的表现优于股票和黄金。

items.title: ChatGPT for research
items.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT for research to gather sources, analyze information, and create structured, citation-backed insights.
items.title_zh: 用于研究的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 进行研究，以收集资源、分析信息并创建结构化的、有引文支持的见解。

items.title: Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
items.title_zh: 带有句子变压器的多模态嵌入和重新排序模型

items.title: Training mRNA Language Models Across 25 Species for $165
items.title_zh: 训练 25 个物种的 mRNA 语言模型，仅需 165 美元

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in March 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from March 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 3 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 3 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model
items.summary: Veo 3.1 Lite is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最具成本效益的视频生成模型 Veo 3.1 Lite 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Veo 3.1 Lite 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.
items.title_zh: 工作哲学
items.summary_zh: 作为北卡罗来纳州技术伦理学博士后研究员，Michal Masny 正在推进新计算技术的社会和伦理层面的对话、教学和研究。

items.title: Evaluating the ethics of autonomous systems
items.summary: MIT researchers developed a testing framework that pinpoints situations where AI decision-support systems are not treating people and communities fairly.
items.title_zh: 评估自治系统的伦理
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了一个测试框架，可以查明人工智能决策支持系统不公平对待人和社区的情况。

items.title: David Einhorn signals caution as his hedge fund Greenlight prioritizes capital protection
items.summary: "It probably won't surprise anyone that we are again putting capital preservation at the top of our priorities," Einhorn said in his latest investor letter.
items.title_zh: 大卫·艾因霍恩 (David Einhorn) 表示谨慎，他的对冲基金 Greenlight 优先考虑资本保护
items.summary_zh: 艾因霍恩在最新的投资者信中表示：“我们再次将资本保值作为我们的首要任务，这可能不会令任何人感到惊讶。”

items.title: Global recession is inevitable if Strait of Hormuz stays shut, says Citadel's Ken Griffin
items.summary: A prolonged blockage of the Strait of Hormuz for the next six to 12 months will mean an unavoidable recession, the billionaire investor said.
items.title_zh: Citadel 的 Ken Griffin 表示，如果霍尔木兹海峡继续关闭，全球经济衰退将不可避免
items.summary_zh: 这位亿万富翁投资者表示，未来 6 到 12 个月霍尔木兹海峡的长期封锁将意味着不可避免的经济衰退。

items.title: JPMorgan tops estimates on Wall Street results, Dimon flags 'increasingly complex' economic risks
items.summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon called the economy resilient, but pointed to an "increasingly complex set of risks" across global markets.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通高于华尔街业绩预期，戴蒙表示经济风险“日益复杂”
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙称经济具有弹性，但指出全球市场“日益复杂的风险”。

items.title: Goldman Sachs tops estimates on record equities trading
items.summary: Goldman Sachs posted record equities trading revenue for the first quarter, helping propel the overall firm to its second-highest quarterly revenue.
items.title_zh: 高盛股票交易创历史新高
items.summary_zh: 高盛第一季度股票交易收入创下历史新高，帮助该公司创下第二高季度收入。

items.title: JD Vance defends backing 'great guy' Orbán's campaign after landslide defeat
items.summary: Hungary's leader was a "great guy" who did a "very good job", the US vice-president said, but he was sure he could work with Péter Magyar.
items.title_zh: JD万斯在压倒性失败后为支持“伟人”欧尔班的竞选活动辩护
items.summary_zh: 这位美国副总统表示，匈牙利领导人是一位“伟大的人”，做得“非常好”，但他确信自己可以与彼得·马扎尔合作。

items.title: Another woman accuses Swalwell of drugging and raping her in 2018
items.summary: Lonna Drewes accused Swalwell of drugging her drink before assaulting her in a hotel room.
items.title_zh: 另一名女子指控斯瓦尔韦尔在 2018 年对她下药并强奸了她
items.summary_zh: 洛娜·德鲁斯 (Lonna Drewes) 指控斯瓦尔韦尔在酒店房间袭击她之前在她的饮料中下了药。

items.title: Retrial over death of Argentina legend Maradona begins
items.summary: The first trial - which saw members of Maradona's medical team accused of poor care - collapsed after a judge let cameras into the court.
items.title_zh: 阿根廷传奇球星马拉多纳死亡重审开始
items.summary_zh: 第一次审判——马拉多纳的医疗队成员被指控护理不善——在法官让摄像机进入法庭后宣告失败。

items.title: French woman, 86, held by ICE after moving to US to reunite with long-lost love
items.summary: The son of pensioner Marie-Thérèse says he worries for his mother's frail health, while she is detained in a Louisiana ICE centre.
items.title_zh: 86岁法国女子移居美国与失散多年的爱人团聚后被ICE拘留
items.summary_zh: 养老金领取者玛丽·泰雷兹 (Marie-Thérèse) 的儿子表示，当母亲被拘留在路易斯安那州 ICE 中心时，他担心母亲虚弱的健康状况。

items.title: Partner of US influencer who died in Zanzibar speaking to police as witness
items.summary: The police said Ashly Robinson, known online as Ashlee Jenae, had died after attempting to take her own life.
items.title_zh: 在桑给巴尔死亡的美国影响者的伴侣作为证人向警方讲话
items.summary_zh: 警方称阿什莉·罗宾逊（Ashly Robinson，网名阿什莉·杰娜）在试图自杀后死亡。

items.title: Watch: What are Harry and Meghan doing in Australia?
items.summary: BBC News journalist Simon Atkinson explains how the couple's tour will be different compared to their last visit.
items.title_zh: 观看：哈利和梅根在澳大利亚做什么？
items.summary_zh: BBC 新闻记者西蒙·阿特金森 (Simon Atkinson) 解释了这对夫妇的这次旅行与上次访问相比有何不同。

items.title: What Happened After Denmark Adopted a Ruined City in Ukraine
items.summary: The Danish government has contributed more than $250 million to Mykolaiv, as the Trump administration pushes a more business-focused plan.
items.title_zh: 丹麦收养乌克兰一座废墟城市后发生了什么
items.summary_zh: 随着特朗普政府推行一项更加以商业为中心的计划，丹麦政府已向尼古拉耶夫捐赠了超过 2.5 亿美元。

items.title: Mark Carney Seals a Majority Government and Remakes Canada’s Liberal Party
items.summary: The rising star in global centrist politics has secured a majority in the Canadian Parliament. Critics are crying foul.
items.title_zh: 马克·卡尼组建多数政府并重塑加拿大自由党
items.summary_zh: 全球中间派政治的后起之秀已在加拿大议会中获得多数席位。批评者们大声疾呼。

items.title: With Algeria Visit, Pope Leo Returns to His Augustinian Roots
items.summary: Some theologians say the pontiff’s understanding of Augustine’s teachings helped inform his response to President Trump’s negative comments about him.

items.summary_zh: 一些神学家表示，教皇对奥古斯丁教义的理解有助于他对特朗普总统对他的负面评论的回应。

items.title: Rakuten to allow XRP to be used as payment method by its 44 million customers
items.summary: Rakuten Pay users will also be able to spot trade XRP via the Rakuten Pay app and exchange the Japanese e-commerce giant’s points to purchase Ripple’s token
items.title_zh: 乐天允许其 4400 万客户使用 XRP 作为支付方式
items.summary_zh: Rakuten Pay 用户还可以通过 Rakuten Pay 应用程序进行 XRP 现货交易，并用这家日本电子商务巨头的积分来购买 Ripple 的代币

items.title: Why Cantor Fitzgerald thinks Robinhood and Coinbase are the best ways to play the prediction market boom
items.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald says Robinhood and Coinbase are best positioned to dominate the prediction market space by leveraging their massive retail scale and existing trading infrastructure.
items.title_zh: 为什么 Cantor Fitzgerald 认为 Robinhood 和 Coinbase 是推动预测市场繁荣的最佳方式
items.summary_zh: Cantor Fitzgerald 表示，Robinhood 和 Coinbase 最有能力利用其庞大的零售规模和现有的交易基础设施来主导预测市场空间。

items.title: Polymarket audits startups potentially helping users copy insider trading: report
items.summary: One startup, Polycool, says, “This isn’t the stock market, where using nonpublic information will land you in jail."

items.summary_zh: 一家初创公司 Polycool 表示，“这不是股票市场，使用非公开信息会让你入狱。”

items.title: Trusted access for the next era of cyber defense
items.summary: OpenAI expands its Trusted Access for Cyber program, introducing GPT-5.4-Cyber to vetted defenders and strengthening safeguards as AI cybersecurity capabilities advance.
items.title_zh: 下一个网络防御时代的可信访问
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 扩展了其可信网络访问计划，向经过审查的防御者引入 GPT-5.4-Cyber​​，并随着 AI 网络安全能力的进步而加强保障措施。

items.title: Enterprises power agentic workflows in Cloudflare Agent Cloud with OpenAI
items.summary: Cloudflare brings OpenAI’s GPT-5.4 and Codex to Agent Cloud, enabling enterprises to build, deploy, and scale AI agents for real-world tasks with speed and security.
items.title_zh: 企业通过 OpenAI 为 Cloudflare Agent Cloud 中的代理工作流程提供支持

items.summary_zh: Chrome 中的技能可让您发现、保存和重新混合 AI 工作流程 - 并立即重复它们。

items.title: Bringing people together at AI for the Economy Forum
items.summary: Google is bringing people together in Washington D.C. at our AI for the Economy Forum.

items.summary_zh: 谷歌将人们聚集在华盛顿特区，参加我们的人工智能经济论坛。

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.

items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 Gemini API 引入两个新的推理层：Flex 和 Priority，以平衡成本和延迟。

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.

items.summary_zh: 由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 提供支持的 Google Vids 即将推出新的 AI 功能，例如免费生成高质量视频等。

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.

items.title: Q&A: MIT SHASS and the future of education in the age of AI

items.title_zh: 问答：MIT SHASS 和人工智能时代教育的未来
